recommendations.title: Sahara
recommendations.overview: A young cobra and his scorpion best friend go on a journey across the Sahara desert to save a new-found love.

recommendations.title: Incontrôlable
recommendations.overview: Georges, one morning, became uncontrollable despite himself. Something that has the donkey's voice in Shrek, can control his body.

recommendations.title: Iceman
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Science Fiction, Comedy, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: An imperial guard and his three traitorous childhood friends ordered to hunt him down get accidentally buried and kept frozen in time. 400 years later, they are defrosted continuing the battle they left behind.

recommendations.title: Ron's Gone Wrong
recommendations.overview: In a world where walking, talking, digitally connected bots have become children's best friends, an 11-year-old finds that his robot buddy doesn't quite work the same as the others do.

recommendations.title: White Girl
recommendations.overview: Summer, New York City. A college girl falls hard for a guy she just met. After a night of partying goes wrong, she goes to wild extremes to get him back.
